# Culture - Iterable

culture

## A Connected Company.

Proud to Put People First

“From day one, Iterable has been a company that puts its people first. It’s a place where employees are empowered to do the best work of their lives. I am fully committed to continuing that legacy, with a clear focus on employee success and a culture of inclusion, belonging, and opportunity.

None of this works without the heart and hustle of this team. That energy is what drives our success, and I’m proud to be a part of it. We move as one team, with speed, clarity, and purpose. We win together. We support each other. We communicate openly. We have fun. And most importantly, we take care of our people.

I’ll always champion a culture where everyone feels seen and supported as their authentic self—and where diversity shows up in how we hire, how we grow, and how we lead.”

**Sam Allen, CEO**

## Culture at Iterable.

**It’s All About How We Work (and Win) Together**

Our culture is the engine that drives us forward. It’s how we move fast, communicate clearly, and stay accountable to each other and our customers. 

**Values We Live By:**

**Run as One, Be an Owner, Transparency, and Growth Mindset**

They’re the standards we expect, the behaviors we model, and the lens through which we make every decision. We’re a community, from our customers to our partners and every “Iterator” on our team, all united by these values as we chase real, measurable success together.

**Empowered to Build**

We’re a company of builders. That means every Iterator has the context, clarity, and ownership they need to drive results. Smart people make smart calls, iterate quickly, and take pride in what they create.

This sense of agency is deeply embedded in how we operate. We don’t chase perfection; we chase momentum. We’d much rather be “directionally right” and moving forward than stuck in endless debate. When we mess up (because we all do!), we own it, learn from it, iterate, and move on.

**Built on Inclusion, Fueled by Diversity**

At Iterable, Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) isn’t just a part of our business; it’s woven into our DNA. We ensure an environment where all Iterators have a fair, fulfilling, and enriching experience. Our DEI strategy anchors us in belonging and the power of innovation through inclusion. Together, we thrive within a culture where diverse perspective shapes our growth and strengthens the Iterable community.

**What This Means for You**

If you’re a customer, know that this is the culture behind the product you use: a principled, fast-moving, people-first company obsessed with your success. If you’re a candidate, especially one who’s eager to build and grow in a high-agency, high-trust environment – we’re actively hiring. Let’s grow together!

**Jim Bartolomea**  
Chief People and Culture Officer

Browse open careers

## Affinity Groups

One of the ways we enable inclusion is through our Affinity Groups, which are employee-created and managed groups of people sharing a common purpose, community or interest. These groups create space for employees to develop relationships, share experiences, voice concerns, solve problems and plan events and activities promoting their community and professional growth.

**Women’s Network**

**Black @ It**

**Asian & Pacific Islander**

**Latinx**

**Pride**

**Parents & Caregivers**

**Mixed Identities**

**Limitless**

## Investing in Our Community

We believe our company succeeds when our communities—locally and globally—succeed alongside us. That’s why we strive to operate sustainably, responsibly, and with environmental awareness, while using our platform to inspire other companies to do the same. In partnership with our employees and customers, we work to drive meaningful social impact, including hosting a quarterly Community Impact Day where our teams dedicate time to volunteer in their communities.

The machine-readable files are formatted to allow researchers, regulators, and application developers to more easily access and analyze data.

## Our Recruiting Process

### Our pledge to you

We pride ourselves on providing a best-in-class candidate experience through every step of the process. To you, we pledge responsiveness, transparency and empathy, as we respect and value the time and effort you put into your career search.

### Discovering who you are

Our recruiting team thoughtfully reviews every application we receive. We are eager to learn more about you, your experience and the skills you bring to a new opportunity.

### Starting the conversation

If we think you might be a good fit for a role, expect a note from someone on our team with an invitation to chat. We are committed to enriching our culture by welcoming a diversity of backgrounds, beliefs and perspectives and staying true to our company values.

## How We Interview

### Uncovering your potential

Our goal is to get to know you as a candidate and better understand your potential fit within Iterable. We’ve spent countless hours designing an interview process where every candidate’s competencies are objectively evaluated.

### Talk, listen and learn

We want you to meet with a variety of people from different teams, and get a sense of what it’s like to work together. We love conversation and at the end of ours we want to ensure no stone is left unturned and all parties have what they need to make the right decisions.

### Values-based interviewing

Ensuring a diverse and inclusive workplace where we learn from each other is core to Iterable’s values, and this extends to our interview process. Please let us know if we can provide any considerations during your interview that will enable you to show us your best work and be your most confident self.

## Joining the Team

### You plus we equals us

We make our hiring decisions based on the best possible fit for each role. Our diverse hiring teams comprise varying levels of seniority, experiences and perspectives to thoughtfully evaluate each candidate against each role’s criteria.

### All things considered

No hiring decision is made unilaterally. We carefully review and consider all feedback from each interviewer before making a thoughtful hiring decision.

### The journey begins

Onboarding starts the moment you accept your offer. With frequent communication, check-ins and immediate team introductions, we roll out the red carpet so every new hire feels welcomed, valued and gets a chance to experience our company culture first-hand.
